extraction.one_line_summary: HERRADA Jesus attacked early in final 500m, dropped TEUNS Dylan who still took red jersey via time bonuses and gaps to GC riders.
tactical_patterns: Astana deliberately allowed DE LA CRUZ David into breakaway to offload red jersey workload, accepting time loss strategically.
TEUNS positioned back during initial breakaway attacks to conserve energy for counter-moves, superior tactical patience versus attacking early.
POGACAR Tadej attacked GC group solo in final kilometers as 20-year-old, forcing QUINTANA/LOPEZ to chase respectfully despite youth.
Breakaway disintegrated final 3km when OLIVEIRA Nelson surged repeatedly, separating strong climbers from opportunists before summit finish.

rider_signals.TEUNS Dylan: positive: took red jersey despite losing stage sprint, demonstrated tactical maturity sitting back during early breakaway attacks
rider_signals.POGACAR Tadej: positive: attacked established GC riders solo at age 20, gained time on LOPEZ despite being marked, shows early Grand Tour aggression
rider_signals.DE LA CRUZ David: positive: moved to 38 seconds GC via breakaway inclusion, Astana strategically willing to surrender red jersey workload
rider_signals.FORMOLO Davide: negative: crashed early while 12th overall, initiated breakaway attacks but couldn't sustain effort on final climb
rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: neutral: multiple late attacks fractured breakaway but couldn't hold off HERRADA's superior finishing speed
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: chased POGACAR personally rather than delegating to teammates, suggests leadership concern over 20-year-old's threat
